inputs.label: Object Flux
inputs.businessContext: Measured radiative flux of the celestial object

inputs.label: Reference Flux
inputs.businessContext: Flux corresponding to magnitude zero point

businessContext_i18n.en: Flux corresponding to magnitude zero point
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır noktası büyüklüğüne karşılık gelen akı
businessContext_i18n.de: Fluss entsprechend dem Nullpunkt der Magnitude
businessContext_i18n.fr: Flux correspondant au point zéro de magnitude

inputs.label: Zero Point Correction
inputs.businessContext: Offset to align with a specific magnitude system

businessContext_i18n.en: Offset to align with a specific magnitude system
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirli bir büyüklük sistemiyle uyum sağlamak için ofset

businessContext_i18n.es: Desplazamiento para alinear con un sistema de magnitud específico

inputs.label: Extinction
inputs.businessContext: Dimming due to interstellar dust (positive value reduces brightness)

businessContext_i18n.en: Dimming due to interstellar dust (positive value reduces brightness)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıldızlararası toz nedeniyle kararma (pozitif değer parlaklığı azaltır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Abschwächung durch interstellaren Staub (positiver Wert verringert Helligkeit)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Atténuation due à la poussière interstellaire (valeur positive réduit la luminosité)
businessContext_i18n.es: Atenuación debida al polvo interestelar (valor positivo reduce el brillo)
businessContext_i18n.ar: التعتيم بسبب الغبار بين النجمي (قيمة موجبة تقلل السطوع)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
